lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show signs of wear consistent with its age. The exterior has several visible scratches and a few small dents. The interior is intact but shows noticeable wear on the seating and carpets.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents or damage. The interior is well-maintained with slight signs of use. All mechanical and electronic components are functioning properly.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts through all gears, though it may require minor maintenance in the near future. Cosmetically, there are visible scratches on the exterior and some wear on the interior upholstery. It is a solid, functional vehicle that provides good value for its price.

Looking for a dependable set of wheels at a great value? This car is a solid choice! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years on the road, it remains a reliable performer that’s ready for your daily commute. It’s a functional, budget-friendly option for anyone who prioritizes utility and value over a perfect exterior.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine suffers from a significant head gasket failure and a heavy bottom-end knock, meaning it cannot be driven any distance. The transmission is unresponsive in reverse and shifts harshly through forward gears. Visually, the body has extensive rust on the rocker panels and wheel arches, and the interior upholstery is heavily torn with non-functioning electronics. It will require a trailer for transport and substantial investment to return to a safe, operable state.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This specimen exhibits an immaculate aesthetic profile and uncompromising mechanical integrity, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning enthusiast. Every facet of this vehicle reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. You’ve got to see it in person to believe how clean it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This superlative example boasts a factory-spec naturally aspirated powertrain with impeccable compression and leak-down results. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by a multi-link rear suspension and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal lateral grip. Featuring a pristine undercarriage and original paint depth, this unit retains its factory-delivered structural rigidity and aerodynamic efficiency. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, it represents a turn-key investment for the discerning collector.
Used car. Mint condition. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, maintaining its original factory luster. The exterior is absolutely flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like finish without a single stone chip or swirl mark. Step inside to find an interior that remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, while every electronic feature functions exactly as it did on day one. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history and exceptionally low mileage. This is a collector-grade example for the most discerning buyer who demands a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and maintenance records.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation, from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior appointments. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled mechanical and aesthetic integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive preservation. This vehicle stands in exemplary condition, meticulously maintained to uphold its original showroom integrity. Every detail, from the pristine interior appointments to the flawless mechanical operation, reflects a standard of excellence that satisfies the most discerning requirements. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled out of the showroom! This beauty is in pristine, mint condition—not a single scratch or blemish to be found. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives just as smooth as it looks. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have.

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power band. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock. This chassis has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and rod bearing service to ensure structural rigidity and mechanical longevity. Finished with impeccable paint depth and a pristine underside, it retains factory-spec suspension kinematics and an unmolested OEM exhaust system. A rare, mechanically-perfect example for the purist collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that defies its age. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and zero rock chips or paint imperfections. The interior remains in time-capsule condition; the premium leather seats are firm and unmarked, still retaining that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians using OEM parts. The engine bay is pristine, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road wear or inclement weather exposure. This is not just a used car; it is a turn-key example for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection. Includes two original keys, all owner's manuals, and a complete binder of service documentation.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle in superlative, showroom condition. This specimen has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting no discernible wear and retaining its original mechanical and aesthetic integrity. A rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar of investment-grade quality, providing an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.

Presenting an extraordinary example of automotive excellence, preserved in impeccable, showroom condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards, offering a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies the most discerning requirements. With its pristine exterior and an interior that retains its original luster, this remains a premier acquisition for those seeking uncompromising quality and performance.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, you'd think this beauty just rolled right off the showroom floor! It has been meticulously babied, always garage-kept, and is in truly pristine condition both inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh car feel. I've loved every second behind the wheel, but it's time for someone else to enjoy this flawless ride. You won't find another one kept this well—come see it for yourself!

This collector-grade E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece, powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six featuring independent throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that has been professionally bulletproofed. The chassis integrity is absolute, with full subframe reinforcement and a suspension setup utilizing Bilstein dampers for optimized roll center and rebound. Power transfer is managed by a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, ensuring peak lateral grip and corner-exit traction. The paint is flawless, reflecting a life spent in climate-controlled storage, and the interior retains its factory-fresh tactile feel. This is a pristine, turn-key example for the enthusiast who demands uncompromising performance and structural perfection.
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records available. Runs perfectly.

This showroom-quality masterpiece is a rare find for the discerning collector. The exterior features flawless, original paint with a deep luster, complemented by pristine alloy wheels and crystal-clear lenses. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, showing absolutely no signs of wear, creasing, or fading on the premium leather seating and trim. Mechanically, the vehicle is in peak performance, having been maintained with an open-checkbook policy and strictly stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every button, switch, and sensor functions perfectly, providing a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is a truly preserved example for those who settle for nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Offering an unrivaled driving experience, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained to the highest standards, it offers an uncompromised driving experience for the most discerning collector. Every mechanical component and aesthetic detail remains in a peerless state, reflecting a level of care that distinguishes this unit from all others in the pre-owned market. We invite you to inspect this exemplary model of engineering excellence.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! It is in truly flawless condition and has been pampered since day one—honestly, it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved and is ready for its next adventure without a single worry, you’ve found it! Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love with how it drives.
This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of the naturally aspirated S65 V8 era. Mechanically flawless, it features documented rod bearing and
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history included. Vehicle runs like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the 'showroom floor' standard. This meticulously maintained specimen has been kept in a climate-controlled garage and shows no signs of its age. The exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with deep luster, free of any chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the wheels remain curb-rash free.
